title: Can search and return match data from all provided CSV files
evidence: DataStore.java:19-26 loads all 5 match CSV files (Brasileirao, Copa do Brasil, Libertadores, Extended, Historical), searchMatches method DataStore.java:215-226, search_matches tool BrazilianSoccerMcpServer.java:89-97, all data loading tests pass

title: Can search and return player data
evidence: DataStore.java:156-204 loads fifa_data.csv players, searchPlayers method DataStore.java:300-310, search_players tool BrazilianSoccerMcpServer.java:112-119, DataStoreTest$PlayerSearch has 4 passing tests

title: Can calculate basic statistics (wins, losses, goals)
evidence: DataStore.java:264-279 getTeamStats method calculates wins/draws/losses/goals, DataStoreTest$TeamStatistics has 2 passing tests, team_stats tool BrazilianSoccerMcpServer.java:99-103

title: Can compare teams head-to-head
evidence: DataStore.java:284-298 HeadToHead record and headToHead method, head_to_head tool BrazilianSoccerMcpServer.java:105-110, DataStoreTest$HeadToHeadComparison passes

title: Handles team name variations correctly
evidence: TeamNameNormalizer.java handles state suffixes and aliases, 7 passing tests in TeamNameNormalizerTest, DataStore.java uses normalizer throughout loading and querying

title: Returns properly formatted responses
evidence: All tool methods (doSearchMatches, doTeamStats, doHeadToHead, doSearchPlayers, doCompetitionStandings, doBiggestWins) in BrazilianSoccerMcpServer.java:168-302 return formatted strings with consistent structure

title: Performance requirement: Simple lookups respond in < 2 seconds
evidence: No performance benchmarks or timing tests present in test suite, actual server performance not validated
suggestion: Add performance tests with response time assertions

title: Performance requirement: Aggregate queries respond in < 5 seconds
evidence: No performance benchmarks or timing tests present in test suite
suggestion: Add performance tests with response time assertions

title: All 6 CSV files are loadable and queryable
evidence: DataStore.java:19-26 loads Brasileirao_Matches.csv, Brazilian_Cup_Matches.csv, Libertadores_Matches.csv, BR-Football-Dataset.csv, novo_campeonato_brasileiro.csv, fifa_data.csv, DataStoreTest$DataLoading passes

title: At least 20 sample questions can be answered
evidence: Tools support queries for: matches by team/opponent/competition/season/date (multiple variations), team statistics by competition/season, head-to-head comparisons, player search by name/nationality/club/position/rating, competition standings, biggest wins. No explicit documentation or validation of 20+ example questions answered.
suggestion: Add documentation with >20 sample questions and validated responses

title: Cross-file queries work (e.g., player + match data)
evidence: No tool or method combines player data with match data (e.g., 'which players played in match X', 'which teams did player X play for'). All queries are either match-based or player-based, never combined.
suggestion: Implement cross-file queries to combine player and match information

title: Maven build successful
evidence: mvn clean test completed successfully with 45 tests passing, 0 failures, 0 errors

title: Good test coverage across all components
evidence: 45 total tests: BrazilianSoccerMcpServerTest (16 tests), TeamNameNormalizerTest (7 tests), DataStoreTest (22 tests) covering protocols, tools, data loading, queries, edge cases
suggestion: Consider adding integration tests for real MCP protocol flows
